evals.prompt: SMELL-1 is a critical issue — the cookie secret defaults to 'change-me-in-production'. fix the env validation so production deployments can't start with a weak secret
evals.expected_output: Updates COOKIE_SECRET in env.ts to reject the default value in production via a Zod refine. Updates .env.example. Adds unit test for the env schema validation.

evals.prompt: fix SMELL-4 — we're storing a plaintext refresh token in the rotationGracePlaintext column. it should be hashed like every other token
evals.expected_output: Stores SHA-256 hash instead of plaintext in rotationGracePlaintext. Updates grace-period comparison to hash incoming token first. Adds test verifying DB never contains raw token.

evals.prompt: the account session list is showing expired sessions to users (SMELL-9) and the admin search has ilike pattern injection (SMELL-10). fix both
evals.expected_output: Adds gt(sessions.expiresAt, new Date()) filter to listSessions. Adds escapeLikePattern helper for admin search. Tests for both: expired session filtering and wildcard character escaping.
